metadata.description: An outreach kit for solo founders. End-to-end pipeline with a hallucination guardrail. Five Claude skills, state file template, multi-channel inbox agent. Paid subscription.

plugins.name: outreach-starter-kit
plugins.description: Five-skill outreach pipeline. The outreach-pipeline skill chains discover -> verify -> draft -> send -> log end-to-end. Individual skills are independently invocable.
